cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Creates a malformed claim heading fixture, runs index --check, and verifies the diagnostic includes the file path, line number, parser rule, object context where available, and a suggested fix.
Builds a heading/YAML claim ID mismatch and verifies the CLI emits the claim object ID with the mismatch rule and fix guidance.
Creates duplicate decision IDs and verifies the second line number, duplicate object ID, rule name, and suggested fix are present.
Writes a malformed research log heading and verifies path, heading line, rule, and fix text in index --check output.
Creates an ExperimentSpec missing required fields and verifies diagnostics identify the experiment object, rule, path, and suggested remediation.
Writes an invalid run ledger CSV row and verifies the diagnostic reports the row, run ID, rule, and fix guidance.
Adds a malformed prediction JSONL record and verifies the parser reports the JSONL line, object context, failed rule, and fix.
Adds a malformed external-label JSONL record and verifies line number, rule, object context, and repair guidance.
Feeds invalid typed platform-record metadata through records validate and verifies strict schema errors identify the offending record field and reason.
Runs labels validate on malformed external-label JSONL and checks the line-specific diagnostic and suggested fix.
Exercises prediction score validation without required locked/run state and verifies the command reports the missing preconditions explicitly.
Writes an ActivationRecord with PRD-required fields, runs records validate, and verifies normalized metadata and typed record acceptance.
Writes a WeightAnalysisRun record with PRD aliases and verifies validation accepts the typed schema without computing weights.
Builds a WeightAnalysisRun fixture and verifies record_specific_id equals record_id on list and show output while extra weight_analysis_id and analysis_id fields fail strict validation.
Compares the canonical PRD-defined typed record set against extension record types and verifies extension records report schema_status extension_record with record_specific_id equal to record_id.

changes_made: Reclassified record_specific_id from partial to implemented because the source PRD defines no additional WeightAnalysisRun ID to add.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Validates extension records and rejects invalid shared metadata so extension rows cannot bypass the typed-record contract.
Exports RO-Crate metadata after writing platform records and verifies every typed record alias appears as metadata only.
Creates a reproducibility bundle and verifies platform record metadata is included while artifact bytes remain excluded by default.
Generates dashboard JSON and verifies platform records, labels, questions, blockers, and debt appear deterministically.
Creates a bundle with platform-record references and verifies metadata is exported without silently copying artifact bytes.
Parses core source imports with AST and verifies heavy ML runtimes and execution backend packages are absent.
Reads pyproject dependencies and verifies forbidden heavy ML, HTTP, RDF, graph, and tracker libraries are not declared.
Scans core source for PatchSpec, ActivationSource, ActivationTarget, adapter, and backend authoring abstractions and verifies none are present.
Reads README and usage docs and verifies they describe MechLedger as a ledger/auditor rather than hosted dashboard, execution framework, or model backend.
Confirms positive platform-record coverage is represented as metadata in export output rather than treated as executable evidence.
Stages only irrelevant files and verifies draft check --staged exits zero with the skip message while not evaluating unrelated working-tree files.
Stages research and project config files and verifies index --check --staged evaluates relevant working-tree paths.
Monkeypatches git command execution and verifies staged commands inspect git diff --cached without invoking stash or checkout operations.
Runs staged commands with no relevant staged paths and verifies the exact skip message and zero exit status.
Executes mechledger run around a Python command and checks run.json, stdout/stderr, artifacts, alias cache, run ledger proposal, and SDK-visible metadata.
Writes a file under the run-local artifacts directory and verifies it is auto-collected into the artifact manifest with non-evidence defaults.
Verifies only explicitly registered or run-local artifact files enter the manifest, so arbitrary repository files are not swept as evidence.
Locks a prediction feature set, scores registered run evidence, and verifies feature matching uses run evidence instead of freeform prose.
Imports and links external labels, then verifies labels remain metadata in query/export output and do not alter claim evidence status.
Links labels to claims and verifies the claim ledger is not promoted merely because external labels exist.
Checks documentation and CLI claims so dashboard support remains local JSON data export, not a hosted server.
